title: NAVI completes roster with CyvOph, assistant coach salah
author: jenopelle

title: MiniBoo moves to Team Liquid's bench by request
description: Not even a year after joining the squad, MiniBoo is seeing out the rest of the 2026 season on Liquid's sideline.
author: jenopelle

title: Barcelona to host Stage 2 EMEA finals
description: Playoffs tickets go on sale July 8 at 18:00 CEST.
author: ChickenJoe

title: adverso calls it a career after six years in competitive Valorant
description: Six years after making his debut, adverso has reached the end of his playing career.
author: jenopelle

title: JDG Esports releases coconut, signs crownfisher
description: JDG officially welcomed its new signing after fielding him in the China Evolution Series.
author: ChickenJoe

title: Filu benched from Natus Vincere ahead of Stage 2
description: NAVI continues its restructure after missing out on London and Paris.
author: ChickenJoe

title: FunPlus Phoenix transfers BerLIN to JDG Esports
description: BerLIN's transfer leaves FPX with just three players ahead of VCT CN Stage 2.
author: ChickenJoe

title: Ben1Ley moves from FunPlus Phoenix to Rare Atom
description: Ben1Ley moves to Rare Atom as the team gears up for a push for Champions Shanghai.
author: jenopelle

title: Trace Esports and Xlele part ways
description: After competing through Stage 1 with the team, Xlele is departing Trace.
author: jenopelle

title: Esports Nations Cup direct-invite teams revealed
description: Retired champions TenZ, Marved, and Sacy return to the international stage in November.
author: ChickenJoe

title: LOUD allows Virtyy to explore options
description: After just over a year with the Brazilian outfit, Virtyy is on his way out.
author: jenopelle

title: After over two years, stew leaves JDG Esports
description: After nearly three years in China, stew may be out after departing JDG.
author: jenopelle

title: LEVIATÁN earns first Masters title in 3-2 victory over PRX
description: LEVIATÁN defeated Paper Rex 3-2 in the Masters London grand finals, earning the team its first Masters title in its first time at an international grand final.
author: weivy

title: Summit to enter competitive pool June 24
description: Season 2026 // Act 4 introduces a brand-new map to the competitive pool coming Wednesday, June 24.
author: ChickenJoe

title: LEVIATÁN sweeps EDG, will rematch Paper Rex in final
description: LEVIATÁN swept EDward Gaming 3-0 in the lower bracket finals of Masters London, securing a rematch against Paper Rex in the grand finals.
author: weivy
